components.content:
# RoleLogic v1.14.1
<@&1409936634878759063>

Faster ways to find what you need, instant log search, and a way to save up to 30% on Premium.

### 🔍 Find your role conditions faster
Long sidebar? It's now searchable and organized for you.
- **Search as you type** to filter conditions by name
- Auto-grouped into **Needs attention**, **Active**, and **Disabled**
- Broken conditions float to the top so you never miss them

### 📜 Search your logs instantly
The log picker is now fully searchable — just type to filter by log name or the channel it posts to. A clear *"No logs found"* appears when nothing matches, so you're never left guessing.

### 💸 Save up to 30% on Premium
Subscribing inside the Patreon iOS app adds Apple's ~30% surcharge. RoleLogic now spots this and helps you pay the original price.
- Friendly heads-up on iPhone & iPad
- Clear guidance if you're viewing inside the Patreon app
- *"Web checkout · no app store fees"* shown right by Subscribe

### 🛠️ Fixes & improvements
- Cleaner search-engine indexing, so the right RoleLogic pages show up on Google
- The status page now also monitors the image service behind your log previews
